channel.title: Egress Gateway on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Egress Gateway on DevOpsTales

item.title: Kubernetes Egress Gateway with Kube-OVN
item.description: Kube-OVN is an open source Kubernetes CNI based on Open vSwitch that provides enterprise-grade networking features including Egress Gateway and Floating IP - completely free and open source. This post explores Kube-OVN’s egress capabilities as another robust open source alternative.

item.title: Kubernetes Egress Gateway Options with Cilium
item.description: Controlling outbound traffic from your Kubernetes cluster is critical for security, compliance, and audit requirements. This post covers Cilium Egress Gateway - a powerful open source solution built on eBPF.

item.title: Kubernetes Egress Gateway Options with Istio Ingress/Egress
item.description: Istio provides a comprehensive service mesh solution with built-in ingress and egress gateway capabilities. This post explores how to leverage Istio’s gateway resources for controlling both inbound and outbound traffic in your Kubernetes cluster.
